postReview.title: Portugal 0-0 Slovenia (aet, 3-0 pens): Ronaldo atones for penalty miss as Selecao inch through
postReview.description: Cristiano Ronaldo atoned for an earlier penalty miss and Diogo Costa was unbeatable as Portugal beat Slovenia on spot-kicks at Euro 2024.

QAData.question: Who won between Portugal and Slovenia on Mon, 01 Jul 2024 19:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Portugal won 0–0 (3–0) over Slovenia after penalties on Mon, 01 Jul 2024 19:00:00 GMT.
